creator: Encyclopaedia Britannica Films, Inc.
description: Reviews the history of immigration to the United States up to the restrictive law passed in 1924. A dramatized scene in a European steamship office is used to show the economic, political and religious motives for immigration. Contains scenes of Ellis Island and New York City in the early 20th century.
subject: Immigration
Diversity
U.S. History: 1900-1927
title: Immigration
